content:
@everyone Hi all!

A new version of Source Sheets has been uploaded!
It now contains the current machine translations for all languages for you to reference; two new sheets (UI & Misc, Events & Resonances) have also been added.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/11w3tZKEggUGb6TYNANL4R4GIeXIdth0M/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=109115841955076800121&rtpof=true&sd=true

*NOTE: Some cells show up as #N/A or #VALUE! because of a technical issue on our end. We're trying to solve this!
